title: Cranberries Members Join Sombr For “Linger” In Dublin
author: Abby Jones
summary:
Sombr had the unique honr of performing in Dublin just one day before St. Patrick's Day. To celebrate, the Gen Z pop star brought out Mike and Noel Hogan, members of the Gen Z -beloved Cranberries. With the Hogans on guitar and bass, Sombr — decked out in shamrock green — sang lead on their hit "Linger," a song that came out 12 years before he was born. Sombr can legally drink in Ireland, so he also unsuccessfully tried to split the G on a pint of Guinness onstage. See clips below.

The post Cranberries Members Join Sombr For “Linger” In Dublin appeared first on Stereogum.
